name: Tailscale
description: Zero-config VPN for secure remote access. Reach your homelab from anywhere without port forwarding.

extra_vars.description: Device name shown in the Tailscale admin console
Whether to accept DNS configuration from Tailscale

steps.instruction: You need a Tailscale auth key to connect this server to your VPN. Open https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys → click 'Generate auth key'. Settings: Reusable → ON, Ephemeral → OFF, Tags → leave empty. Set expiry to 90 days (or 'No expiry'). Click 'Generate key' and copy the key (starts with tskey-auth-...)
Paste the Tailscale auth key (starts with tskey-auth-...)

After pasting, HomeStack will restart Tailscale and verify authentication. If it does not connect within 60 seconds, the wizard will tell you whether to approve the machine or paste a fresh key. Once connected, install the Tailscale app on your phone/laptop and sign in with the same account to access your homelab remotely

Optional — Subnet routing: edit .env → add to TS_EXTRA_ARGS: --advertise-routes=192.168.1.0/24 (use your LAN subnet). Approve at Tailscale admin → Machines → your server → Edit route settings → enable the subnet
Optional — Exit node: add --advertise-exit-node to TS_EXTRA_ARGS in .env. Approve at Tailscale admin → Machines → your server → Edit route settings → toggle 'Use as exit node'
